purpose: Reference for the Code Explorer (IDE) React components: IDEView, IDEWelcome, FileExplorer, CodeEditor (Monaco), EditorTabs, WorkspaceTabs, SearchPanel, SearchResults, DebugToolbar, DebugPanels, DebugConsolePanel, ProblemsPanel. Documents responsibilities, prop contracts, and integration with Monaco Editor.
gotchas: Monaco editor instance must be disposed on tab close to prevent leaks
FileExplorer is virtualized — large directories require lazy expansion
Debug panels only render when an active debug session exists
patterns: Multi-workspace tabs with isolated state per workspace
Editor tabs share single Monaco instance via models
